Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Jun-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOHN T. HENDRICKS, tel. no. 986-9800 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
RICHARD MANZER, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BEN LYON's Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted, for good cause shown. No opposition was filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Continued To Jun-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BEN LYON'S Petition To Compel ArbITRATION IS Continued to June 19, 2013 per stipulation of the parties and order filed on April 11, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Hrg On Petition To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BEN LYON's Petition To Compel Arbitration is Continued to April 17, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must immediately deliver courtesy copies of its moving papers to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
